-- Generated by Oracle SQL Developer And Reforged 

CREATE TABLE CoreAbilities (
    id   INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    name VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL
);

ALTER TABLE CoreAbilities ADD CONSTRAINT CoreAbilities_pk PRIMARY KEY ( id );

CREATE TABLE Fractions (
    id   INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    name VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL
);

ALTER TABLE Fractions ADD CONSTRAINT Fractions_pk PRIMARY KEY ( id );

CREATE TABLE Guesses (
    id       INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    "date"   DATE NOT NULL,
    units_id INTEGER NOT NULL
);

ALTER TABLE Guesses ADD CONSTRAINT Guesses_pk PRIMARY KEY ( id );

CREATE TABLE Keywords (
    id   INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL
);

ALTER TABLE Keywords ADD CONSTRAINT Keywords_pk PRIMARY KEY ( id );

CREATE TABLE CoreAbilitiesUnitsCT (
    CoreAbilities_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    units_id         INTEGER NOT NULL
);

ALTER TABLE CoreAbilitiesUnitsCT ADD CONSTRAINT CoreAbilitiesUnitsCT_pk PRIMARY KEY ( CoreAbilities_id,
                                                                  units_id );

CREATE TABLE FractionsUnitsCT (
    Fractions_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    units_id     INTEGER NOT NULL
);

ALTER TABLE FractionsUnitsCT ADD CONSTRAINT FractionsUnitsCT_pk PRIMARY KEY ( Fractions_id,
                                                                  units_id );

CREATE TABLE relation_3 (
    subFractions_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    units_id        INTEGER NOT NULL
);

ALTER TABLE relation_3 ADD CONSTRAINT relation_3_pk PRIMARY KEY ( subFractions_id,
                                                                  units_id );

CREATE TABLE relation_4 (
    Keywords_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    units_id    INTEGER NOT NULL
);

ALTER TABLE relation_4 ADD CONSTRAINT relation_4_pk PRIMARY KEY ( Keywords_id,
                                                                  units_id );

CREATE TABLE relation_5 (
    user_id    INTEGER NOT NULL,
    Guesses_id INTEGER NOT NULL
);

ALTER TABLE relation_5 ADD CONSTRAINT relation_5_pk PRIMARY KEY ( user_id,
                                                                  Guesses_id );

CREATE TABLE subFractions (
    id   INTEGER NOT NULL,
    name VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL
);

ALTER TABLE subFractions ADD CONSTRAINT subFractions_pk PRIMARY KEY ( id );

CREATE TABLE units (
    id        INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name      VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL,
    toughness INTEGER NOT NULL,
    wounds    INTEGER NOT NULL,
    points    INTEGER NOT NULL
);

ALTER TABLE units ADD CONSTRAINT units_pk PRIMARY KEY ( id );

CREATE TABLE users (
    id       INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name     VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL,
    email    VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL,
    password VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL
);

ALTER TABLE users ADD CONSTRAINT users_pk PRIMARY KEY ( id );

ALTER TABLE Guesses
    ADD CONSTRAINT Guesses_units_fk FOREIGN KEY ( units_id )
        REFERENCES units ( id );

ALTER TABLE CoreAbilitiesUnitsCT
    ADD CONSTRAINT CoreAbilitiesUnitsCT_CoreAbilities_fk FOREIGN KEY ( CoreAbilities_id )
        REFERENCES CoreAbilities ( id );

ALTER TABLE CoreAbilitiesUnitsCT
    ADD CONSTRAINT CoreAbilitiesUnitsCT_units_fk FOREIGN KEY ( units_id )
        REFERENCES units ( id );

ALTER TABLE FractionsUnitsCT
    ADD CONSTRAINT FractionsUnitsCT_Fractions_fk FOREIGN KEY ( Fractions_id )
        REFERENCES Fractions ( id );

ALTER TABLE FractionsUnitsCT
    ADD CONSTRAINT FractionsUnitsCT_units_fk FOREIGN KEY ( units_id )
        REFERENCES units ( id );

ALTER TABLE relation_3
    ADD CONSTRAINT relation_3_subFractions_fk FOREIGN KEY ( subFractions_id )
        REFERENCES subFractions ( id );

ALTER TABLE relation_3
    ADD CONSTRAINT relation_3_units_fk FOREIGN KEY ( units_id )
        REFERENCES units ( id );

ALTER TABLE relation_4
    ADD CONSTRAINT relation_4_Keywords_fk FOREIGN KEY ( Keywords_id )
        REFERENCES Keywords ( id );

ALTER TABLE relation_4
    ADD CONSTRAINT relation_4_units_fk FOREIGN KEY ( units_id )
        REFERENCES units ( id );

ALTER TABLE relation_5
    ADD CONSTRAINT relation_5_Guesses_fk FOREIGN KEY ( Guesses_id )
        REFERENCES Guesses ( id );

ALTER TABLE relation_5
    ADD CONSTRAINT relation_5_user_fk FOREIGN KEY ( user_id )
        REFERENCES "user" ( id );
